response.justification: Bogdan has extensive technical depth, strong open-source contributions in developer tooling (e.g., Fluent-Asserts, Trial), and proven leadership in tooling and CI/CD infrastructure — aligning well with engineering productivity goals. However, he lacks explicit evidence of people management experience beyond technical mentoring, and there's no clear demonstration of roadmap ownership or organizational change leadership required for this Level II Manager role.
strengths: 10+ years of hands-on software development with deep expertise in developer tools and test automation frameworks.
Strong open-source contributions in testing infrastructure and build tooling (e.g., Fluent-Asserts, Trial, CI/CD setup).
Proven ability to lead technical initiatives across diverse stacks and platforms, including mobile (iOS/Apple TV).
concerns: No clear evidence of formal people management or team leadership responsibilities beyond technical mentorship.
Lacks documented experience in strategic roadmap planning or leading organizational change initiatives.
Minimal mention of mobile platform ecosystems (iOS/Android) as a focus area in recent roles.
